notes:
• OCR overhauled: a language picker (English, German, French, Russian, Ukrainian, Turkish, Turkmen and more — remembered), long-scan support with page-by-page progress, and clean error reporting.
• Turkmen is read through the Turkish engine with dictionary correction off.
• Split long PDFs at import: from 50 pages up, the review dialog offers Split… — page ranges become separate documents; the original stays untouched.
